{"query":"Pakistan Telecommunication Authority restore Wikipedia access directive Prime Minister 2025 exact date","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1580,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://tribune.com.pk/story/2399664/pm-orders-immediate-restoration-of-wikipedia-across-pakistan","title":"PM orders immediate restoration of Wikipedia","content":"Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif has directed the Pakistan Telecommunication Authority (PTA) to immediately restore the online encyclopaedia website Wikipedia across Pakistan, days after it was blocked for failing to remove “sacrilegious content”.
Prime Minister@CMShehbaz has directed that the Wikipedia website be restored with immediate effect.
But the telecommunications authority blocked the website across the country on Saturday after it failed to comply with its orders."},{"url":"https://wikimediafoundation.org/news/2023/02/03/wikimedia-foundation-urges-pakistan-telecommunications-authority-to-restore-access-to-wikipedia-in-pakistan/","title":"Wikimedia Foundation urges Pakistan Telecommunications Authority to restore access to Wikipedia in Pakistan – Wikimedia Foundation","content":"Update: On February 6, 2023, the Wikimedia Foundation was made aware that the Pakistan Telecommunications Authority (PTA) had been directed to restore access to Wikipedia in Pakistan.
Wikipedia is available in more than 300 languages; its 55 million articles bring together information from news, research, and other publications to create a living record of history.
The Wikimedia Foundation calls on Pakistan to restore access to Wikipedia and Wikimedia projects in the country immediately.
The European Court of Human Rights (ECHR) has decided to expedite a case brought by the Wikimedia Foundation against the government of Turkey for blocking Wikipedia in the country."},{"url":"https://www.dawn.com/news/1735657/pm-shehbaz-orders-immediate-restoration-of-wikipediawww.dawn.com","title":"PM Shehbaz orders immediate restoration of Wikipedia - Pakistan - DAWN.COM","content":"Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif on Monday ordered the immediate restoration of popular online encyclopedia Wikipedia that was banned by the telecom regulator last week for not “blocking/removing sacrilegious content”.
Prior to the ban, the PTA had degraded Wikipedia services countrywide for not complying with its directives.
It added that the committee held a meeting during which the members of the committee highlighted how Wikipedia was a useful website supporting the “dissemination of knowledge and information for the public, students and the academia”.
“Blocking the site in its entirety was not a suitable measure to restrict access to some objectionable content,” the PMO statement said."},{"url":"https://www.dw.com/en/pakistan-lifts-wikipedia-ban/a-64629215","title":"Pakistan lifts Wikipedia ban","content":""Wikipedia has been unblocked as per the directions of the prime minister," Malahat Rab, a spokesperson for the PTA, told news agency DPA."},{"url":"https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pakistan_Telecommunication_Authority","title":"Pakistan Telecommunication Authority - Wikipedia","content":"As a result of auction, Telenor and Warid Telecom entered Pakistan's telecom market.
Telenor, Ufone and Zong also won an additional 1.2 MHz in the same band.
PTA officially awarded the spectrum licenses to all participating operators on 19 March 2026, allowing the roll-out of 5G services to the general public.
Further expansion of surveillance powers is anticipated with the enactment of the Digital Nation Pakistan Act 2025.
In July 2020, PTA banned the online game PlayerUnknown's Battlegrounds.
In response, PTA lifted ban on the popular online game.
In March 2021, PTA said that a court ordered to block TikTok due to complaints from "indecent" content.
The Pakistan Telecommunication Authority banned Wikipedia in the country due to "sacrilegious content" in February 2023.
Although Pakistan Telecommunication Authority (PTA) has made the upcoming auction for Next Generation Mobile Services (NGMS) spectrum (3G/4G) more lucrative for new entrants, it remains pessimistic about the participation of any new player.
"Ban on PUBG to remain in interest of public order: PTA"."}]}

The Wikimedia Foundation believes that knowledge is a human right. The Wikimedia Foundation calls on Pakistan to restore access to Wikipedia and Wikimedia projects in the country immediately. The Wikimedia Foundation believes that access to knowledge is a human right. We hope that the Pakistan government joins with the Wikimedia Foundation in a commitment to knowledge as a human right and restores access to Wikipedia and Wikimedia projects promptly, so that the people of Pakistan can continue to receive and share knowledge with the world.","score":0.4391465,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://english.aaj.tv/news/30311478/wikipedia-foundation-calls-on-pakistan-to-restore-access","title":"Wikipedia Foundation calls on Pakistan to restore access","content":"On February 1, the PTA announced that it was downgrading Wikipedia services in Pakistan over Wikipedia Foundation's refusal to remove “","score":0.39831337,"raw_content":null}],"response_time":1.59,"request_id":"6815b23c-18ee-41e3-84bf-2922c4f0296d"}
